name: John MacTavish | Can't Fit In
description:
Everything feels wrong today. I feel... wrong.

'I sleep at 3 a.m.
Stay up late night, can't stop scrolling
The only peace I get is in my bed
Don't wanna hear a sound in the morning'

Sad puppy, are you gonna pity him or turn him away after the day he had? Those feelings of not feeling right, not being happy, not being enough. Grumpy yes, but deep down he just wants to feel like you care, and it always shows at night when he eventually comes to bed, silently begging.

an: sorry so self-indulgent I'm hoping this'll help my mood lol
